home.subtitle: A developer learning and growing
home.description: Recording my programming journey, projects, and growth notes.

hero.title: I turn ideas into products and enjoy the creative process behind every line of code.
hero.description: I am aliu. I like working from APIs, data, and business logic all the way to frontend interaction and visual details. The product should be stable, the experience should feel smooth, and the page should be good enough to stay with.
hero.identity: Building full-stack skills while sharpening my eye for design.
hero.direction: I want to build products that stand strong from architecture, APIs, and interaction to visual design, making complex logic stable and pages beautiful enough.
hero.learning: Continuing to go deeper into frontend expression and product implementation

techStack.title: Tech Stack
techStack.description: This is the technology map I have mastered: from frontend interfaces and backend services to databases and toolchains, these are the capabilities I can use to solve problems and complete products.

items.title: Yishen Mini Program
items.description: An enterprise approval workflow management system with custom approval flows, multi-level review, real-time notifications, and a smoother approval experience.

items.title: E-commerce System
items.description: A complete e-commerce solution covering product management, order processing, payment integration, and user accounts, with access across PC and mobile platforms.

learning.title: Continuous Learning
learning.description: I am continuing to go deeper into Next.js while thinking about how to bring more complete design expression into real products.

about.title: About Me
about.content: I am aliu, a developer who keeps learning. Feel free to connect, and welcome to Star or Fork my projects.

footer.description: Collecting learning, projects, and design thinking while continuing to build products that feel stable, smooth, and beautiful.
